seoTitle: North Mackay vs North Maclean — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Mackay and North Maclean. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Mackay vs North Maclean: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Mackay and North Maclean.
heading: North Mackay vs North Maclean — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Mackay, Queensland and North Maclean, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to North Maclean (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Mackay or North Maclean safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Mackay has a flood risk score of 30/100, while North Maclean scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Mackay scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. North Maclean scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Mackay or North Maclean?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
